name: Keldo the Sacred Protector
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>像</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ケルドウ
desc: You can discard 1 other EARTH Fairy monster; Special Summon this card from your hand, then add 1 "Exchange of the Spirit" or 1 card that mentions it from your Deck to your hand. (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your field or GY, then target up to 3 cards in any GY(s), or up to 5 if "Exchange of the Spirit" is on your field or in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Keldo the Sacred Protector" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
